category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Iceland EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入冰岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入冰島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV-charger documentation against Iceland EEA-aligned CE expectations, IST-referenced EN/IEC evidence, Landsnet and project-grid expectations, Type 2 / CCS2 interface migration, OCPP interoperability, and safety/emc/RCD requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 EV 充电桩文件与冰岛 EEA 对齐 CE 预期、IST 对接 EN/IEC 证据、Landsnet 与项目电网要求、Type 2 / CCS2 接口转换、OCPP 互操作性，以及安全/EMC/RCD 要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁檔案與冰島 EEA 對齊 CE 預期、IST 對接 EN/IEC 證據、Landsnet 與項目電網要求、Type 2 / CCS2 接口轉換、OCPP 互通性，以及安全/EMC/RCD 要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, grid permit, charging service permit, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current Icelandic and EEA electrical, grid, data, safety, labeling, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE 适用范围裁定、电网许可、充电服务许可、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前应与具备资质的冰岛和 EEA 专业人士核实现行电气、电网、数据、安全、标签与海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE 適用範圍裁定、電網許可、充電服務許可、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前應與具備資格的冰島及 EEA 專業人士核實現行電氣、电網、資料、安全、標籤與海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Iceland, the practical gaps are EEA-aligned market placement and CE documentation, EN/IEC 61851 safety and EMC coverage by model, Type 2 / CCS2 connector alignment in the European interface environment, grid interconnection and service-operator route checks, OCPP backend acceptance where required, and site-level residual-current, earthing, and commissioning controls.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入冰岛时，主要实际差距包括 EEA 对齐的市场准入和 CE 文件、按型号的 EN/IEC 61851 安全及 EMC 覆盖、欧洲生态中的 Type 2 / CCS2 接口对接、并网及服务运营方路径检查、所需的 OCPP 后台兼容、以及现场剩余电流、接地和调试控制。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入冰島時，主要實務差距包括 EEA 對齊的市場准入與 CE 文件、按型號的 EN/IEC 61851 安全及 EMC 覆蓋、歐洲生態中的 Type 2 / CCS2 接口對接、併網及服務營運方路徑審查、所需的 OCPP 後台兼容，以及現場剩餘電流、接地和調試控制。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
